LRI_count.description: Number of children with lower respiratory tract infection (LRI) in each respiratory rate category. Used to calculate sensitivity and PPV at the >50 breaths/min cut-off.

URI_count.description: Number of children with upper respiratory tract infection (URI) in each respiratory rate category. Used to calculate the proportion of unnecessarily treated infants at the >50 breaths/min cut-off.

respiratory_rate_group.description: Respiratory rate categories (breaths/min) used as the diagnostic criterion. The cut-off of >50 breaths/min is applied to classify children as having LRI or URI.
